heading: Forest reserves in New Mexico and Arizona restricted
label: 471a Forest reserves in New Mexico and Arizona restricted
text: No forest reservation shall be created, nor shall any additions be made to one created prior to , within the limits of the States of New Mexico and Arizona except by Act of Congress.June 15, 1926
notes: References in TextForest reservation, referred to in text, probably should be “national forest”. See , , which provided that forest reserves shall hereafter be known as national forests.act Mar. 4, 1907, ch. 290734 Stat. 1269
amendments: References in TextForest reservation, referred to in text, probably should be “national forest”. See , , which provided that forest reserves shall hereafter be known as national forests.act Mar. 4, 1907, ch. 290734 Stat. 1269
